summary: Comprehensive testing of E-Mail-Protokoll feature for Graupner Suite (Iteration 9). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: E-Mail-Protokoll navigation menu, EmailLogPage with search, DocumentPreview Versandhistorie section, email dialog with auto-refresh.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/email/log returns list of all email log entries
Backend: Email log entries have required fields (id, to_email, subject, doc_type, doc_id, status, sent_at)
Backend: Email log entries sorted by sent_at descending (newest first)
Backend: GET /api/email/log requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/email/log/{doc_type}/{doc_id} returns email history for specific document
Backend: GET /api/email/log/{doc_type}/{doc_id} requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/email/log for nonexistent document returns empty list
Backend: POST /api/email/document/{type}/{id} creates email log entry with status=gesendet
Backend: POST /api/email/dunning/{id} creates email log entry with doc_type=dunning
Backend: Email log contains entries from previous email sends
Backend: GET /api/email/log/quote/{id} works for quote documents
Backend: GET /api/email/log/order/{id} works for order documents
Frontend: Navigation has 'E-Mail-Protokoll' menu item with MailCheck icon
Frontend: E-Mail-Protokoll positioned between 'Leistungen' and 'Website-Integration' in nav
Frontend: /email-log page shows 'E-Mail-Protokoll' title with email count
Frontend: EmailLogPage has search input for filtering emails
Frontend: Email log entries display subject, doc_type badge, doc_number, recipient, customer, timestamp
Frontend: Status badges show green checkmark for 'gesendet', red X for 'fehlgeschlagen'
Frontend: DocumentPreview shows 'Versandhistorie' section at bottom when emails exist
Frontend: Versandhistorie shows email count and list of sent emails with timestamps
Frontend: DocumentPreview has 'E-Mail' button in header
Frontend: Email dialog opens with to_email, subject, message fields and Send button
Frontend: Email dialog has 'Abbrechen' (Cancel) and 'Senden' (Send) buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Email log feature properly implemented with automatic logging on email send
log_email function correctly stores: id, to_email, subject, doc_type, doc_id, doc_number, customer_name, status, sent_at
Both success (gesendet) and failure (fehlgeschlagen) statuses are logged
DocumentPreview correctly fetches email history on open and after sending
EmailLogPage properly filters by customer_name, to_email, doc_number, and subject
Navigation correctly positions E-Mail-Protokoll between Leistungen and Website-Integration
MailCheck icon from lucide-react used for nav item as specified
seed_data_creation: Used existing email log entries from previous tests: 3 entries (2 for invoice R-2026-0002, 1 for dunning R-2026-0007)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Log feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/email/log (all logs, sorted by date desc), GET /api/email/log/{doc_type}/{doc_id} (document-specific logs). Email logging is automatic when POST /api/email/document/{type}/{id} or POST /api/email/dunning/{id} is called. Frontend: /email-log page shows all sent emails with search, DocumentPreview shows Versandhistorie section at bottom when emails exist for that document. SMTP is REAL (not mocked) using secure.emailsrvr.com:465 SSL.
